retrieved_result: How to Travel from Oahu to Outer Hawaiian Islands \"Island-hop Hawaii starting in Oahu. When booking a trip to Hawaii, plan the interisland travel to maximize the leisure time instead of waiting around for transport connections. The outer islands include the Big Island, Maui, Kauai, Molokai and Lanai. They also include smaller islands, such as Niiha\"
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses inter-island travel in Hawaii, unrelated to TikTok trends.
combined_text_for_llm: How to Travel from Oahu to Outer Hawaiian Islands "Island-hop Hawaii starting in Oahu. When booking a trip to Hawaii, plan the interisland travel to maximize the leisure time instead of waiting around for transport connections. The outer islands include the Big Island, Maui, Kauai, Molokai and Lanai. They also include smaller islands, such as Niiha

history.title: How to Travel from Oahu to Outer Hawaiian Islands
history.description: "Island-hop Hawaii starting in Oahu. When booking a trip to Hawaii, plan the interisland travel to maximize the leisure time instead of waiting around for transport connections. The outer islands include the Big Island, Maui, Kauai, Molokai and Lanai. They also include smaller islands, such as Niiha
